acceptance_targets: [chapter_16_f003] PASS if the revised named spans communicate the same financial/accountability facts while using clearly differentiated phrasing per speaker and no more than one repeated receipts/facts/logistics keyword per exchange; FAIL if multiple adjacent exchanges still hinge on the same repeated keyword bundle.

[chapter_16_f004] PASS if the exact antithetical pattern ("not ..., just ...") appears no more than twice in the chapter after revision and the targeted lines retain equivalent meaning via non-matching syntax; FAIL if all three formula instances remain.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised named spans communicate the same financial/accountability facts while using clearly differentiated phrasing per speaker and no more than one repeated receipts/facts/logistics keyword per exchange; FAIL if multiple adjacent exchanges still hinge on the same repeated keyword bundle.
findings.problem: Mechanical repetition from over-literal stress-tell execution: the accountability lexicon (receipts/facts/logistics) is reiterated so often that voice texture narrows and emotional modulation flattens.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:55-81, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:129-143, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:245-287, keep factual precision but vary diction and delivery by speaker (Theo boundary language, Eli shame language, Nora task language) so accountability is not carried by the same repeated token set.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the exact antithetical pattern ("not ..., just ...") appears no more than twice in the chapter after revision and the targeted lines retain equivalent meaning via non-matching syntax; FAIL if all three formula instances remain.
findings.problem: Recurring antithesis formula ("not X, just Y") appears three times, creating a detectable prose tic that blunts impact.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least one of the constructions in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:19, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:233, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_16.md:241 into different sentence mechanics (direct image, action-first line, or concrete noun-led close) to break formula repetition.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
